moments.author: Seattle Mariners (Logan Gilbert spotlight)
moments.quote: Logan Gilbert’s casual underhand flip for an out—with a grin—set social media ablaze during today’s Mariners–Blue Jays game.
moments.why: A lighthearted, viral moment from a pitcher—not just athletic but charismatic—captured fans’ attention and humanized the sport.

moments.author: José Fermín / St. Louis Cardinals
moments.quote: Cardinals dugout broke out synchronized rowing after my double—thanks to Norway’s World Cup team—so fun, gonna keep rolling with it.
moments.why: Cross-sport cultural borrowing—from soccer to baseball—sparked attention for its creativity and team chemistry.

moments.author: Cristiano Ronaldo
moments.why: Ronaldo’s post after Portugal’s dramatic World Cup win—and as oldest knockout scorer—resonated globally with fans and media.

moments.author: Angel City FC / fans
moments.quote: Fireworks shot into the crowd after Angel City FC’s match—malfunctioned but fans left safely, no injuries.
moments.why: A tense, surprising incident at a sports celebration that went viral—highlighting safety and crowd reaction on social platforms.
